description: Charter Quoting Engine — generates charter quotes based on aircraft operating costs, fuel estimates, crew costs, landing fees, FBO handling, and operator margin for one-way, round-trip, and multi-leg itineraries

hard_stops.label: Quote Below Operating Cost
hard_stops.logic: Quoted price results in a negative margin — operator would be operating at a loss. Quote must cover direct operating costs at minimum.

hard_stops.label: No Economic Authority
hard_stops.logic: Operator does not hold the required economic authority (DOT certificate) for this route, aircraft type, or service type

soft_flags.label: Fuel Price Estimate Stale
soft_flags.logic: Fuel price used in the quote is more than 24 hours old — actual cost may differ

soft_flags.label: Landing Fee Estimated
soft_flags.logic: Landing fee is estimated, not confirmed with the destination FBO — actual fee may vary

soft_flags.label: Peak Demand Pricing Advisory
soft_flags.logic: Requested dates fall within a peak demand period — pricing may be above standard rates

soft_flags.label: Competitor Rate Deviation
soft_flags.logic: Generated quote differs significantly from market rate benchmarks — review pricing strategy
